title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary: One of the biggest and busiest Posidonia events ever. With the majority of shipping sectors enjoying healthy market conditions,the global maritime community gathered in Athens for a week of meetings, networking, celebrations, and strategic discussions. The overall sentiment was positive, with market participants expressing optimism that supportive fundamentals will continue to underpin freight markets in the months ahead.
